data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for materials used tracking, specifically with receipt photo uploads. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case mentions the uploading of receipts, but there is no evidence of the actual tracking mechanism or the ability to upload receipt photos being validated, leading to a clear gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of materials used tracking with receipt photo upload being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add endpoint for materials tracking validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that materials used tracking with receipt photo upload is functional and meets the requirement.
